description: Ahmed Zifsaf, head of crypto partnerships at Worldpay, discusses the company's role as the largest payment processor globally and its involvement in the crypto ecosystem, including a partnership with Solana and the Global Dollar Network.
topic_summary: Zifsaf outlines Worldpay's operations in the crypto space, highlighting its $6 billion in card-to-crypto transactions and the potential for stablecoin integration to enhance payment efficiency, particularly with USDG on the Solana Network [t=203.82].
